arts.ttl: Ante Palaversa tells Aberdeen pals how they can turn Rangers atmosphere early as Jimmy Thelin message revealed
arts.sum: The Dons have won just two away games in the league since September with three huge games to go in the race for third sport
Ian Wilkerson has taken a look at the fixture list in the Scottish Premiership and picked out a correct-score prediction for each of the six games in week 36.

arts.ttl: Jimmy Thelin doubles down on crucial Aberdeen target as boss lands two pronged boost before Rangers
arts.sum: The Swede has confirmed duo Alexander Jensen and Kristers Tobers will be available for the trip to Ibrox
